message:
CLI inbox path fallback and DB backup path fix for relative paths

- cli/lib.rs: Extract normalize_http_path() helper and add
  check_inbox_server_urls() with /api/ <-> /mcp/ alias fallback.
  When check-inbox fails on the primary URL, automatically retry
  with the alternate path prefix. Add fetch_inbox_via_jsonrpc_with_fallback
  to gracefully handle servers that expose the inbox endpoint under
  either prefix.

- db/pool.rs: Fix sqlite_backup_candidates() for relative primary paths.
  Previously returned an empty list when the primary DB path was
  relative (no parent directory). Now falls back to Path::new(".")
  so backup candidates are discovered in the current directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
